---
title: "5c_FitVRmodels_climOnly_mtOnly"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)
library(parallel)
library(patchwork)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds") %>% list2env(.GlobalEnv)
clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv")
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "pop", "year")]

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo_25cm.csv")
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "pop", "plantID","elv_pt")]
mt_mod_vars <- setdiff(mt_vars, "prcv_25")

surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")

surv_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
growth_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
repro_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
```

# --------------
# Clim-only models

```{r climOnly_global_models}
surv_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), " + site*aspect.cat) + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_clim_mod <- glmer(surv_clim_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)

growth_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), " + site*aspect.cat) + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_clim_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)

repro_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), " + site*aspect.cat) + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_clim_mod <- glmer(repro_clim_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial, nAGQ = 0)

nflrs_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), " + site*aspect.cat) + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_clim_mod <- glmer(nflrs_clim_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ = 0)
```


```{r climOnly_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(30, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_climOnly <- dredge(surv_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, subset = !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) & !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_growth_climOnly <- dredge(growth_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, subset = !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) & !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_repro_climOnly <- dredge(repro_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, subset = !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) & !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_nflrs_climOnly <- dredge(nflrs_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2, subset = !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) & !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r climOnly_model_selection}
surv_climOnly_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_climOnly, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
growth_climOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_climOnly, subset = 3)[[1]]
repro_climOnly_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_climOnly, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_climOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_climOnly, subset = 1, nAGQ = 1)[[1]]
```

```{r growth_var_climOnly_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_climOnly_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_var_clim_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(30, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_climOnly <- dredge(growth_var_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_climOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_climOnly, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_var_climOnly_best_mod_data <- growth_var_mod_data_scaled
```

# --------------
# MT-only models

```{r mtOnly_global_models}
surv_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_mt_mod <- glmer(surv_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)

growth_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)

repro_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial, nAGQ = 0)

nflrs_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ = 0)
```

```{r mtOnly_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_mtOnly <- dredge(surv_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)

dredge_growth_mtOnly <- dredge(growth_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)

dredge_repro_mtOnly <- dredge(repro_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)

dredge_nflrs_mtOnly <- dredge(nflrs_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mtOnly_model_selection}
surv_mtOnly_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_mtOnly, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
growth_mtOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mtOnly, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_mtOnly_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_mtOnly, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_mtOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_mtOnly, subset = 1, nAGQ = 1)[[1]]
```

```{r growth_var_mtOnly_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_mtOnly_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(mt_mod_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(30, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_mtOnly <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2)
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mtOnly_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mtOnly, subset = 1)[[1]]
```

# --------------
# Save models

```{r save_models}
climOnly_dredge_top10 <- list(
  surv_dredge_climOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_surv_climOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_dredge_climOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_climOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_var_dredge_climOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_var_climOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  repro_dredge_climOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_repro_climOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  nflrs_dredge_climOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_nflrs_climOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10)
)

mtOnly_dredge_top10 <- list(
  surv_dredge_mtOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_surv_mtOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_dredge_mtOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_mtOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_var_dredge_mtOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_var_mtOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  repro_dredge_mtOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_repro_mtOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  nflrs_dredge_mtOnly = as.data.frame(dredge_nflrs_mtOnly) %>% slice_head(n = 10)
)

climOnly_model_list <- list(
  surv_climOnly_best_mod = surv_climOnly_best_mod,
  growth_climOnly_best_mod = growth_climOnly_best_mod,
  repro_climOnly_best_mod = repro_climOnly_best_mod,
  nflrs_climOnly_best_mod = nflrs_climOnly_best_mod,
  growth_var_climOnly_best_mod = growth_var_climOnly_best_mod,
  growth_var_climOnly_best_mod_data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled
)

mtOnly_model_list <- list(
  surv_mtOnly_best_mod = surv_mtOnly_best_mod,
  growth_mtOnly_best_mod = growth_mtOnly_best_mod,
  repro_mtOnly_best_mod = repro_mtOnly_best_mod,
  nflrs_mtOnly_best_mod = nflrs_mtOnly_best_mod,
  growth_var_mtOnly_best_mod = growth_var_mtOnly_best_mod,
  growth_var_mtOnly_best_mod_data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled
)

saveRDS(climOnly_model_list, paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_climOnly_mods_", Sys.Date(), ".RDS"))
saveRDS(mtOnly_model_list, paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_mtOnly_mods_", Sys.Date(), ".RDS"))
```
